meaning: Special letters Ta Sin that open this chapter (exact meaning known only to Allah)
that (pointing to something far away, referring to ءَايٰتُ/verses)
the Quran (object of آيَٰتُ - verses of)
and a book (connected to مُّبِينٍ - clear/manifest)
a clear (book) making things clear (describing كِتَابٍ)
the prayer (object of يُقِيمُونَ - they establish)
in/about the afterlife (object of يُوقِنُونَ - they are certain)
they believe (referring to those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
their deeds/actions (as object of زَيَّنَّا/we made attractive)
they wander blindly (referring to those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
those (pointing to people far away who are mentioned in the next ayah)
and indeed you (subject of تُلَقَّى - you receive)
when (referring to the time when موسى said)
Moses (the prophet mentioned in قَالَ/he said)
indeed I (speaking to أَهْلِهِۦٓ - his family)
a fire (object being seen by موسى)
I will come to you all
with news (object of سَـَٔاتِيكُم - I will bring you)
or (connecting 'bring you news' with 'bring you a burning torch')
I am bringing to you all (referring to Musa speaking to his family)
perhaps you all (expressing hope that تَصْطَلُونَ will happen)
then when (connects to جَآءَهَا - she came to it)
came to her (the fire mentioned in النَّارِ)
that (introduces what was called out in نُودِىَ)
O Moses! - calling out to Moses
The Mighty One (one of Allah's names, subject of this ayah)
The All-Wise (as a name/title of Allah)
and throw! (command to throw your staff)
then when (connects to رَءَاهَا - he saw it)
he saw her/it (referring to the staff/عَصَا)
as if it/she (referring to عَصَاكَ - your staff)
turning back (describing how Musa وَلَّىٰ/turned away)
he looks back (in negative context of وَلَمْ)
except (connects to مَن ظَلَمَ - whoever wrongs)
he wronged (subject of بَدَّلَ - he changed)
good conduct (referring to replacing bad deeds with good ones)
then indeed I (am غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ - forgiving and merciful)
Most Forgiving (as a name of Allah)
and make (your hand) enter! (command to put يَدَكَ)
in (location preposition for جَيْبِكَ - your bosom/chest)
from (connects غَيْرِ to what came before)
any harm (being acted upon by مِنْ غَيْرِ - without)
of nine (part of تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ - nine signs)
and his people (referring to Pharaoh's people)
indeed they (referring to فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِ - Pharaoh and his people)
then when (followed by جَآءَتْهُمْ - came to them)
it came to them (referring to آيَاتُنَا/Our signs)
they said (subject of هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ - 'this is clear magic')
one who makes very clear (describing سِحْرٌ/magic)
with it (referring to the signs they denied)
and she became completely convinced of it (referring to the signs/evidence mentioned before)
knowledge (as the object being given to داود وسليمان)
and they both said (referring to داود وسليمان)
the praise (subject of what they said)
The one who (refers to Allah who favored them)
we were taught (subject of the verb)
speech (object of عُلِّمْنَا - we were taught)
the favor, the bounty (predicate of هو)
the clear, manifest one (describing الفضل - the favor)
and was gathered (subject: جُنُودُهُۥ - his armies)
and the humankind (part of جُنُودُهُۥ/his forces)
and the birds (part of Solomon's forces)
they are being arranged/kept in order (referring to سُلَيْمٰنَ جُنُودُهُ - Solomon's forces)
when (used for future or conditional events)
an ant (subject of قَالَتْ - she said)
he will definitely crush/break you all (addressing the ants)
and his armies (subject of يَحْطِمَنَّ - will crush)
so he smiled to himself pleasantly (before ضَاحِكًا/laughing)
O my Lord! (calling upon one's Lord)
Your blessing/favor (object of أَشْكُرَ - that I may thank)
you bestowed favor (upon عَلَىَّ - upon me)
upon me (connected to نِعْمَتَكَ - Your favor)
and that (connects to أَعْمَلَ - I do/work)
a righteous deed (object of أَعْمَلَ - I may do)
and he examined thoroughly (subject of قَالَ)
the bird (object being inspected by تَفَقَّدَ)
then he said (following وَتَفَقَّدَ - and he searched)
the hoopoe bird (object of أَرَى/I see)
or (connecting to مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ)
the ones who are away/hidden (part of مِنَ group)
I will most certainly punish him severely
I will most surely slaughter him
with a proof of authority (object of لَيَأْتِيَنِّى - he will surely bring me)
far/distant (describing غَيْرَ, showing it follows another word)
so he said (connects to previous ayah)
a woman (object of وَجَدتُّ - I found)
she rules them (referring to her people)
and she was given (referring to the queen امْرَأَةً)
and for her (referring to the queen mentioned as امْرَأَةً)
and her people (object of وَجَدتُّهَا - I found)
from (connecting دُونِ with what comes before)
and he made (something) very beautiful (subject of فَصَدَّهُمْ)
for them (referring to قَوْمَهَا - her people)
the Satan (the one who deceives them)
their deeds (referring to the people who were prostrating to the sun)
and so he strongly prevented them (connected to يَسْجُدُونَ)
and so they (subject of لَا يَهْتَدُونَ)
that not (introduces what they should do in يَسْجُدُوا۟)
they prostrate (after أَلَّا meaning 'that they do not')
for/to Allah (object of يَسْجُدُوا - they prostrate)
the one who (describes what comes after يَسْجُدُوا۟)
he brings forth/makes (something) come out (subject of يَسْجُدُوا)
the hidden thing (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings forth)
and he knows (what follows يُخْرِجُ - brings forth)
that which (connects to تُخْفُونَ - you conceal)
you (plural) hide (what you hide is mentioned in context)
deity/god (object of لا meaning 'there is no')
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
we will look/observe (in response to قَالَ - he said)
did you tell the truth? (asking about the message from هُدْهُد)
you were (subject of سَنَنظُرُ - we will see)
the people who speak untruthfully (object of مِنَ - from/among)
to them (who will receive كِتٰبِى - my letter)
and look! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
what? (asking about the response to فَأَلْقِهْ)
it was thrown/delivered (to إِلَىَّ - to me)
a noble book (subject of أُلْقِىَ - was sent)
indeed it (referring to the letter/message from سُلَيْمٰنَ)
and indeed it (referring to the letter/message)
that not (introducing a negative command in تَعْلُوا۟)
do not rise in arrogance (against me) (connected to أَلَّا)
upon me (connected to تَعْلُوا۟ - be arrogant)
and come to me! (command to a group)
she said (the Queen of Sheba speaking to المَلَؤُا - the chiefs)
the noble assembly, the chiefs (addressing the queen)
give me (all of you) your formal opinion
my matter/affair (object of أَفْتُونِى - advise me)
I was (subject of قَالَتْ - she said)
one who decides/cuts off (feminine, predicate of كُنتُ)
a matter/affair (object of أَفْتُونِى - advise me)
possessors of, people of (subject of قَالُوا)
when (introduces the condition that دَخَلُوا۟ follows)
they entered (subject of أَفْسَدُوهَا - they corrupted it)
a village (being entered by الْمُلُوكَ - the kings)
and they made/set/placed (referring to what kings do to a town's people)
its people (referring to قَرْيَةً, the town)
they do/make/act (referring to the kings mentioned earlier in the verse)
to them (referring to the messengers mentioned in ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ)
with a gift (that she is sending)
and so (I am) a female watcher/waiter
with what (asking about the means/way something will be done)
with wealth/money (related to أَتُمِدُّونَنِ - 'will you provide me')
then what (connects to سُلَيْمٰنَ قَالَ - Solomon said)
rather/but rather (contrasts with previous statement about giving wealth)
you all (plural masculine, subject of تَفْرَحُونَ)
you all feel joy/happiness (referring to the people receiving the gift in the ayah)
so we will definitely come to them
to/for them (referring to the army/soldiers mentioned in جُنُودٍ)
and we will definitely make them exit
and they (who are صٰغِرُونَ - in a state of being humbled)
O noble assembly! (calling out to them)
he comes/arrives to me (in jussive mood)
that (connects to يَأْتُونِى - they come to me)
a powerful and cunning being (subject of قَالَ - said)
I (subject of ءَاتِيكَ - I will bring)
I bring to you (responding to سليمان's request)
upon him/it (referring to the throne mentioned earlier)
indeed/truly strong (describing عِفْرِيتٌ - a powerful jinn)
I (subject of ءَاتِيكَ - I will bring it to you)
he returns back (before طَرْفُكَ - your glance)
Then when (connects to رَءَاهُ - he saw it)
being settled (object of رَءَاهُ/he saw it)
this (pointing to something in the ayah)
from (connects فَضْلِ to what came before)
or (connecting to ءَأَشْكُرُ - 'should I be grateful')
I reject/am ungrateful (in أَمْ أَكْفُرُ - 'or I am ungrateful')
so/then surely only (connects to كَفَرَ - whoever disbelieved)
he rejected/was ungrateful (subject in وَمَن كَفَرَ)
or (asking which of two options in أَتَهْتَدِىٓ ... أَمْ)
she is/exists (subject of نَنظُرْ - we will see)
Then when (connects to جَآءَتْ - she came)
she came (subject of قِيلَ - it was said)
Is it like this? (asking about the throne)
as if it (referring to عَرْشُكِ - your throne)
and he strongly blocked her (from worshipping Allah)
what (that which she used to worship)
she was (subject of تَّعْبُدُ - she worships)
indeed she (emphasizes that she was from كٰفِرِينَ people)
to her (object of قِيلَ - it was said)
then when (connects to رَأَتْهُ - she saw it)
she thought/considered it (referring to الصَّرْحَ - the palace floor)
a deep pool (which she saw as water) (object of حَسِبَتْهُ - she thought it)
indeed it (referring to صَرْحٌ - palace floor)
master who cares for others (belonging to العٰلَمِينَ - all worlds)
indeed I (speaking to رَبِّ - my Lord)
I did wrong (subject speaking to رَبِّ)
and I submitted (to Allah's will, in response to seeing the truth)
the worlds/realms (that Allah is Lord of)
a righteous one (object of أَرْسَلْنَآ/we sent)
Allah (as the object being worshipped in اعْبُدُوا)
two groups (that are disputing with each other in يَخْتَصِمُونَ)
O my people! (being called by صالح)
with the evil deed (object of تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ)
why don't you (addressing the people Salih is speaking to)
Allah (as the object being asked to forgive in تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ)
perhaps/in order that you all (connected to تُرْحَمُونَ)
we saw bad omens (in بِكَ - in you)
but rather (contrasting with قَالُوا they said)
a group (of nine men, mentioned in تِسْعَةُ)
they corrupt (in contrast to يُصْلِحُونَ - they reform)
they (all) shared among themselves (subject of قَالُوا۟)
we will definitely attack him at night
and his family (object of لَنُبَيِّتَنَّ - we will attack by night)
then, after that (connects to لَنَقُولَنَّ - we will surely say)
to his guardian (object of لَنَقُولَنَّ - we will surely say)
and indeed we (connected to لَصٰدِقُونَ - truly truthful)
and we plotted (in response to their plot)
they sense (subject of لَا - they do not)
and so look!/then observe! (connected to previous statement)
their plot (referring to the plot of those who were destroyed)
that we (subject of دَمَّرْنٰهُمْ - we destroyed them)
lying empty (describing their houses in بُيُوتُهُمْ)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the destroyed houses mentioned before)
And the prophet Lut (as the object of what comes after - إِذْ قَالَ)
to his people (who he spoke to)
the shamefully bad deed (as object of أَتَأْتُونَ - do you commit)
is it indeed you all? (subject of لَتَأْتُونَ)
surely you all come/approach (addressing the people of Lot)
the men (as objects of لَتَأْتُونَ - you approach)
a people, a nation (subject of أنتم)
then what (asking about the response of قَوْمِهِ)
that (introduces what was said after قَالُوٓا۟)
from/out of (connecting قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ to قَرْيَتِكُمْ with emphasis)
indeed they (are أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ - people who purify themselves)
and his family (object of فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ - so We saved him)
except (excluding امْرَأَتَهُ from those who were saved)
the ones who stay behind (after مِنَ)
and we caused rain to fall (upon عَلَيْهِم)
upon them (referring to the people who were rained upon in وَأَمْطَرْنَا)
and then it became bad (result of عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا)
the ones who are warned (object of فَسَآءَ)
Is Allah...? (questioning if Allah is better)
Who is it that... (introducing a rhetorical question in أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ)
he created (subject of أَمَّنْ - 'who is it that')
and he sent down (connected to خَلَقَ - created)
water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
with it/by means of it (connected to مَآءً - water)
gardens (object of فَأَنۢبَتْنَا - what We caused to grow)
for you all (connected to أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
that (introduces the clause تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ - you could grow its trees)
a people (subject of يَعْدِلُونَ - they deviate)
they deviate/turn away (referring to those who associate partners with Allah)
or who?/is it not he who? (subject of جَعَلَ)
for her/it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
and he made/placed (connected to previous جَعَلَ)
rather (contradicting the previous question about other gods)
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
they know (referring to the disbelievers mentioned as أَكْثَرُهُمْ in the ayah)
Who is it that... (introduces the question about يُجِيبُ - answers)
he answers/responds (to الْمُضْطَرَّ - the distressed one)
the desperately needy one (who يُجِيبُ responds to)
he called out to him (object of يُجِيبُ - responds to)
and he makes/sets you all (as successors)
the earth (object being acted upon in this ayah)
is there a god? (questioning the existence of another deity besides اللَّهِ)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes before)
a little (describing how much is remembered in مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ)
Who is it that... (introducing a rhetorical question)
of the land (contrasted with وَٱلْبَحْرِ - and the sea)
as good news (describing how the winds are sent in يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيٰحَ)
of Allah (possessed by رَحْمَتِهِ - His mercy)
or who? (asking about the subject of يَبْدَؤُا - begins)
he returns/brings it back (object of يَبْدَؤُا)
of/from the sky/heaven (source of رِزْق provision)
Is there a deity? (questioning the existence of another deity besides اللَّهِ)
you (all) were (addressing the disbelievers in يَبْدَؤُا۟)
he knows (what is in the heavens and earth)
and the earth/ground (possessed by/connected to something)
the unseen realm (what is being known in يَعْلَمُ)
and not (they do not know when they will be resurrected)
they perceive (referring to those in the heavens and earth)
when (asking about يُبْعَثُونَ - they will be resurrected)
they caught up with each other
but rather (contradicting what was said about هُمْ)
rather/but (correcting what was said about عِلْمُهُمْ)
from it/her (referring to الْآخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)
and he said (introducing what ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ said)
is it when? (questioning what كَفَرُوا say)
dust, soil (object of كُنَّا - we were)
is it really that we? (expressing disbelief in being resurrected)
surely ones who are brought out
we were promised (subject of this statement)
we (as the subject of وُعِدْنَا - we were promised)
not (negating هٰذَآ أَسٰطِيرُ - these are legends)
except, only (in this ayah, introduces what the previous promises were)
travel! (multiple people) (followed by فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ - in the earth)
and (all of you) look!/so (all of you) observe! (command to group)
upon them (who are being discussed in the ayah)
when (asking about time in وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ - and they say, "When?")
the promise (subject of when is this?)
if (introducing condition for كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ - you are truthful)
perhaps/maybe (expressing hope about يَكُونَ - it will be)
it followed closely (referring to the punishment they were rushing for)
for you all (connected to رَدِفَ - followed closely)
some/part of (subject of يَكُونَ - to be)
surely a possessor of (of فَضْلٍ - bounty)
they thank/are thanking (referring to most people in ٱلنَّاسِ)
and indeed (connects to what your Lord knows)
your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ)
surely he knows (what their hearts conceal)
that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
and what (refers to what they make public in يُعْلِنُونَ)
they make public (referring to what the disbelievers conceal and reveal in صُدُورُهُمْ)
and what/and not (connects this word to previous statement)
and of the earth (connected to السَّمَآءِ - the heaven/sky)
except (what comes after this word is not included in what was mentioned before)
Israel (meaning: Servant of Allah) - name of Prophet Jacob (peace be upon him)
they/them (referring to the Children of Israel who disagree)
and indeed it (referring to the Quran)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of Allah)
so rely completely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
the truth (after على/upon in فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى)
indeed you (subject of تُسْمِعُ - you cannot make hear)
the dead ones (subject of لَا تُسْمِعُ - you cannot make hear)
and not (negates تُسْمِعُ - you make hear)
the deaf ones (object of تُسْمِعُ - you cannot make hear)
they turned away intensively (from the truth/guidance)
those who turn back (describes their state when they turned away in وَلَّوْا)
a guide (for the blind from their error)
not (negating تُسْمِعُ - you can make hear)
except (what comes after this word from مَن يُؤْمِنُ - those who believe)
he believes/has faith (in آيَاتِنَا - our signs)
upon them (the people who disbelieved in الْقَوْلُ)
for them (the people who disbelieved in ٱلنَّاسَ)
a creature (object of أَخْرَجْنَا/We will bring forth)
she speaks to them (referring to دَآبَّةً, the creature)
that, indeed (emphasizing what comes after it)
the people (object of تُكَلِّمُهُمْ - speaks to them)
they were (referring to those who disbelieve in the signs mentioned in تُكَلِّمُهُمْ)
and on the day (object of نَحْشُرُ)
from those who (subject of يُكَذِّبُ - denies/rejects)
with/by our signs (which are being rejected)
they are being gathered (refers to those who deny Our signs)
until/up to (shows a limit or endpoint)
Did you all deny/reject? (speaking to Allah's signs in this ayah)
you all were (speaking to a group)
upon them (subject of يَنطِقُونَ - they speak)
with what/by what (connects to ظَلَمُوا - they wronged)
they see/saw (after أَلَمْ meaning 'did they not')
that we (object of يَرَوْا - they see)
in it (referring to ٱلَّيْلَ - the night)
and the daytime (object of جَعَلْنَا/We made)
and on the day (object of يُنفَخُ - is blown)
the horn (object of يُنفَخُ فِى - is blown into)
and so he became suddenly frightened (subject of يُنفَخُ)
of the heavens/skies (in relation to مَن فِى - whoever is in)
Allah (as the doer of the action)
those who are humbled (object of أَتَوْهُ - they came to Him)
the mountains (object of تَرَى - you see)
you consider them (the mountains) (while you see them)
while it (referring to الْجِبَالَ - the mountains)
it passes by (referring to الْجِبَالَ - the mountains)
it passes by (subject of the mountains in وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ)
of the clouds (describing how the mountains pass by مَرَّ)
the one who/which (connects to أَتْقَنَ - perfected)
He made perfect (referring to Allah in this ayah)
with what (referring to what تَفْعَلُونَ you do)
you (all) do/make/act (referring to what Allah is aware of)
whoever (does جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ - comes with good)
then for him (connected to جَآءَ - came)
from/than it/her (referring to الْحَسَنَةِ - the good deed)
on that day (when the good deed is done)
and so she/it was thrown down (refers to وُجُوهُ/faces)
you (all) work/do (referring to what was done in the Fire)
only/just (emphasizing what comes next in أُمِرْتُ)
I was ordered (connected to أَنْ أَكُونَ - that I be)
he made it completely forbidden (referring to الْبَلْدَةِ - the city)
and to him belongs (connected to كُلُّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
that (connects to أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)
and that (connects to previous statement and introduces أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ)
and say! (connected to next word الْحَمْدُ)
and so you all recognize her/it
unaware of (describing what Allah is not)
you (plural) do/act/work (in response to سَيُرِيكُمْ - He will show you)
